name: super
description: 📡 SPR: Open Source, secure, user friendly and fast wifi routers for your home. One wifi password per device. Ad Blocking & Privacy Blocklists. Policy Based Network Access
readme_summary: SPR is an open-source, user-friendly, and secure WiFi router solution designed for home networks. It offers advanced features like per-device WiFi passwords, policy-based network access, ad blocking, and granular DNS control, enhancing both security and privacy.
key_features: One Password Per WiFi Device
Policy Based / Zero Trust Network Access
Per-Device DNS Rules & Ad Block Lists
Multi-PSK with WPA3
Wireguard VPN
Multi WAN with Load Balancing
DNS over HTTPS
React UX
API Plugin System
primary_use_case: To provide a secure, user-friendly, and highly configurable WiFi router solution for home networks, enabling advanced network segmentation and security controls.
cover_image_prompt: A futuristic home router depicted as a central hub, with distinct, glowing pathways extending from it to various devices (laptops, phones, smart home gadgets). Each pathway is a different color, representing individual network segments. One pathway is a solid, secure shield, symbolizing enhanced security. Another pathway is a filtered stream, showing blocked ads. Small, stylized icons representing security protocols and DNS queries float around the hub. The 'SPR' logo is subtly integrated into the router's design. The overall scene is clean, modern, and uses a vibrant, tech-inspired color palette, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style.

name: codeburn
description: See where your AI coding tokens go. Interactive TUI dashboard for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor cost observability.
readme_summary: CodeBurn is a local TUI dashboard for tracking AI coding token usage and costs across various AI tools. It provides detailed breakdowns of spending by task, model, project, and provider, helping developers understand and optimize their AI expenses without sending any data externally.
key_features: Tracks token usage, cost, and performance across 20+ AI coding tools
Breaks down spending by task type, model, tool, project, and provider
Runs locally, reading session data directly from disk
Prices calls using LiteLLM
Interactive TUI dashboard
Provides optimization suggestions and comparison features
Supports Cursor and OpenCode with optional dependency
primary_use_case: Observing and optimizing AI coding token expenditure by providing a detailed, local breakdown of usage across different AI tools and projects.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old librarian meticulously organizing and cataloging an immense library of glowing, ethereal books, each representing an AI coding session. The librarian uses a magnifying glass to examine the 'cost' and 'token usage' inscribed on each book's spine, sorting them into different shelves labeled 'Projects', 'Models', and 'Tasks'. Subtle digital particles representing data flow around the librarian, and a small, clean UI element showing a pie chart of expenses is visible on a nearby desk. The scene is set in a cozy, dimly lit study with warm ambient light, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with clear, defined shapes and a rich color palette.

name: open-source-games
description: A list of open source games.
readme_summary: This repository is a curated list of open-source video games and open-source remakes of commercial games. It categorizes games by genre, providing links to their websites and source code repositories.
key_features: Curated list of open-source games
Categorization by genre
Links to game websites
Links to source code repositories
Includes open-source remakes of commercial games
primary_use_case: Discovering and accessing open-source video games and their development resources.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant, stylized illustration of an overflowing treasure chest, spilling out not gold, but a diverse array of retro and modern video game cartridges and discs. From the chest, streams of glowing code and digital particles flow outwards, forming pathways to open source logos and GitHub Octocats. In the background, a diverse group of stylized characters representing different game genres (e.g., a knight, a race car driver, a city planner) are excitedly reaching for the games. The overall mood is one of discovery and abundance, with a clean, bright aesthetic. The repository name 'open-source-games' is subtly integrated into a banner above the chest. Style: 3D isometric illustration with bright, saturated colors and clear, friendly character designs.

name: activepieces
description: AI Agents & MCPs & AI Workflow Automation • (~400 MCP servers for AI agents) • AI Automation / AI Agent with MCPs • AI Workflows & AI Agents • MCPs for AI Agents
readme_summary: Activepieces is an open-source, self-hosted workflow automation platform designed to be extensible through a type-safe TypeScript framework. It allows users to build AI-powered workflows and integrations, acting as an alternative to services like Zapier, with a strong focus on community contributions and an AI-first approach.
key_features: Extensible through a type-safe pieces framework in TypeScript
Open ecosystem with community-contributed pieces available on npmjs.com
AI-First: Native AI pieces and AI SDK for building agents and workflows
Enterprise-Ready: Self-hosted, customizable branding, and role-based access
Secure by Design: Self-hosted and network-gapped
Human in the Loop: Features for delayed execution and approval
Human Input Interfaces: Chat and Form interfaces for user interaction
Builder Features: Loops, branches, auto-retries, HTTP, code execution (NPM), versioned flows, customizable templates
Over 200 supported integrations
primary_use_case: AI-powered workflow automation and integration, serving as an open-source, self-hostable alternative to platforms like Zapier.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant, bustling digital workshop where various AI characters are assembling intricate, glowing workflows. One AI, acting as a master craftsman, is connecting different 'piece' modules (represented by colorful, interlocking blocks with icons like gears, brains, and chat bubbles) to a central 'AI Brain' hub. Data streams, visualized as glowing threads, flow between the pieces and the hub, illustrating the automation process. Subtle UI elements resembling a no-code builder interface are visible on floating screens. The overall scene is clean, modern, and filled with a sense of collaborative creation, emphasizing extensibility and AI integration. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with bright, optimistic colors and clear, friendly character designs.

name: ntfy
description: Send push notifications to your phone or desktop using PUT/POST
readme_summary: ntfy is an open-source, HTTP-based pub-sub notification service that allows users to send push notifications to their phones or desktops from any script or computer without sign-up or fees. It provides a free hosted service at ntfy.sh and also offers open-source Android and iOS apps.
key_features: HTTP-based pub-sub notification service
Send notifications to phone/desktop via scripts
No sign-up or fees required for basic usage
Self-hostable open-source service
Open-source Android and iOS apps available
Free hosted service at ntfy.sh
primary_use_case: Sending instant, scriptable push notifications to personal devices without requiring complex setup or third-party accounts.
cover_image_prompt: A stylized, glowing megaphone sits on a desk, emitting sound waves that transform into digital notification icons (like a bell or a speech bubble) and travel instantly to a smartphone and a laptop screen in the background. The megaphone has subtle 'ntfy' branding. Small, abstract lines of code flow from a script icon towards the megaphone, representing the input. The overall mood is efficient and modern, with a clean, minimalist aesthetic. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with soft, ambient lighting and a focus on clear visual flow from source to destination.
